case_title: DAMION DAVIS VS. US HEALTH WORKS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT US HEALTH WORKS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DAVIS, DAMION AS TO DEFENDANT US HEALTH WORKS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 5/26/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, DAMION
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY 25, 2018. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ONLY. AFTER MATTER WAS CALLED AND NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF AND NO PROOF OF SERVICE, THE COURT ORDERS DIMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. NO EXHIBITS DETAINED. (506)
